server.name: case-management
server.description: APTL Case Management MCP Server - Provides AI agents with access to TheHive for incident case management, observable tracking, and investigation workflows.

list_cases.description: List recent cases from TheHive. Returns case summaries with status, severity, and assignee.

create_case.description: Create a new incident case. Required: title, description, severity (1-4). Example: {"body": {"title": "Suspicious Login Activity", "description": "Multiple failed logins from 172.20.4.30", "severity": 2, "tags": ["brute-force", "authentication"]}}

add_observable.description: Add an observable to a case. Required: dataType, data. Types: ip, domain, hash, filename, url, mail. Example: {"params": {"caseId": "~123"}, "body": {"dataType": "ip", "data": "172.20.4.30", "message": "Attacker IP"}}

update_case.description: Update case status, severity, or add notes. Example: {"params": {"caseId": "~123"}, "body": {"status": "InProgress", "customFields": {"investigation-notes": {"string": "Confirmed malicious activity"}}}}

create_alert.description: Create an alert for triage. Required: title, description, type, source. Example: {"body": {"title": "Wazuh: SQL Injection", "description": "SQLi detected on webapp", "type": "wazuh", "source": "wazuh-siem", "severity": 3}}
